subtitle: We use this information to make Global Nature Watch more useful to you. This tool is experimental, and knowing you better helps us improve. Features may change or be removed over time.

emailConsent: By creating an account, you agree to receive essential emails about your Global Nature Watch account and system updates. You can unsubscribe from non-essential emails at any time.
